entities.name: MICRONUTRIENT MALNUTRITION
entities.description: A global health challenge characterized by a deficiency of essential micronutrients, particularly affecting women and children

entities.name: BIOFORTIFICATION
entities.description: The process of increasing the micronutrient density in edible plant parts through genetic means to address malnutrition

entities.name: SORGHUM
entities.description: A major global staple crop used to meet micronutrient requirements for low-income populations

entities.name: IRON
entities.description: A micronutrient (Fe) whose levels are elevated in biofortified sorghum grains

entities.name: ZINC
entities.description: A micronutrient (Zn) whose levels are elevated in biofortified sorghum grains

entities.name: GRAIN YIELD
entities.description: The amount of grain produced per unit area, which was maintained or increased in biofortified sorghum

entities.name: PARBHANI SHAKTI
entities.description: The first biofortified sorghum cultivar released in India in 2018

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: The country where the biofortified sorghum cultivar Parbhani Shakti was released

entities.name: PROTEIN CONTENT
entities.description: A nutritional attribute that is higher in the Parbhani Shakti cultivar

entities.name: PHYTATES CONTENT
entities.description: An anti-nutritional factor that is lower in the Parbhani Shakti cultivar

entities.name: SEED CONSORTIUM
entities.description: An innovative organizational structure designed to deliver biofortified varieties to farmers quickly

entities.name: ICRISAT
entities.description: An international research organization involved in the development and delivery of biofortified sorghum

entities.name: INDIAN NARS
entities.description: The National Agricultural Research System of India involved in the multi-stakeholder partnership
